By Avi in WhatsApp API Partner Integration Solution — 02 Feb 2026

Embed WhatsApp Business API Into Your SaaS or Agency Platform

Embed WhatsApp Business API into your SaaS or agency platform - without building from scratch. Chakra Chat's Partner Program gives you multi-client management, real-time APIs, and zero markup on Meta messaging. Start free. Scale fast.

  1. What Is the Chakra Chat API Integration Partner Solution?
  2. Key Features of the Partner Integration
    1. 1. Embed WhatsApp Setup Directly Into Your Product
    2. 2. Multi-Tenant Architecture for Managing Multiple Clients
    3. 3. Full-Featured Messaging APIs
    4. 4. Native Lead Management and Chatbot Support
  3. How Parter Solution Pricing Works
  4. Why Choose Chakra Chat for Your WhatsApp Integration?
  5. How to Get Started: Integration Steps
  6. Is This the Right Solution for You?
  7. Ready to Add WhatsApp to Your Platform?
  8. FAQs

A complete guide for SaaS providers, vertical software companies, and digital agencies looking to integrate WhatsApp messaging natively into their product.

If you're building a vertical SaaS platform  -  whether for spas, clinics, real estate, e-commerce, or HR  -  or running a marketing or digital agency, chances are your clients are already asking for WhatsApp automation. The demand is real. WhatsApp has over 3 billion active users, and businesses increasingly use it as a primary channel for customer engagement, appointment reminders, order updates, and campaign messaging.

The challenge? Integrating WhatsApp Business API from scratch is complex, costly, and slow. That's where Chakra Chat's API Integration Partner Solution comes in.

This article walks you through what the solution offers, how it works, who it's built for, and why it might be the fastest way to add WhatsApp to your platform.

What Is the Chakra Chat API Integration Partner Solution?

The Chakra Chat Partner solution is designed for businesses that want to embed WhatsApp Business API capabilities directly into their own product or service offering  -  without building the infrastructure themselves.

In simple terms: you get a white-label-friendly, API-first WhatsApp integration layer that you can plug into your existing platform, manage multiple client accounts from one place, and automate messaging at scale.

There are two main types of partners this solution is built for:

  • Vertical SaaS Providers  -  Platforms serving specific industries (spa management software, clinic management systems, field service tools, HR platforms, etc.) that want to natively offer WhatsApp communication features to their users.
  • Agencies and Marketing Solutions  -  Digital agencies and marketing technology companies running WhatsApp campaigns, chatbots, and automated messaging on behalf of their clients.

Key Features of the Partner Integration

1. Embed WhatsApp Setup Directly Into Your Product

Chakra Chat provides an Embedded Signup flow, so your customers can connect their WhatsApp Business Account (WABA) and phone numbers without ever leaving your platform. You stay in control of the user experience, while Chakra handles the underlying API complexity.

Specifically, you can:

  • Create and manage WhatsApp Channels and WABAs programmatically
  • Manage customer WhatsApp channels using plugins and APIs
  • Provision new numbers and WABA accounts at scale

2. Multi-Tenant Architecture for Managing Multiple Clients

One of the biggest pain points for agencies and SaaS platforms is managing multiple client WhatsApp accounts. Chakra's partner architecture solves this with a centralized API gateway that supports multi-tenancy  -  meaning you can manage hundreds of client accounts from a single partner login.

Authentication, routing, and client-specific logic are all centralized, keeping your operations clean and scalable.

3. Full-Featured Messaging APIs

Chakra's API documentation (available at apidocs.chakrahq.com) covers a comprehensive set of use cases:

  • Broadcast and template messaging
  • Chat session messages with interactive media
  • WhatsApp Flows integration
  • Template message creation and management APIs
  • Media management APIs
  • Inbound message event webhooks
  • API logs for troubleshooting and audit
  • Chakra Campaigns  -  add leads to campaigns programmatically

4. Native Lead Management and Chatbot Support

Beyond raw messaging, Chakra gives your platform access to native lead management, chatbot configuration, and chat agent routing  -  so your product can deliver complete WhatsApp CRM and automation workflows, not just message delivery.

Chakra Chat's pricing model is straightforward and partner-friendly:

  • Subscription-based: Pick a Chakra Chat product plan

  • Additional numbers: Add extra WhatsApp numbers beyond the base plan for just $3 per number  -  ideal for agencies and multi-client SaaS platforms managing many accounts.
  • No markup on template messaging: Template messaging charges (Marketing, Utility, Authentication categories) are billed directly by Meta (WhatsApp) to your client's connected WABA at standard Meta rates. Chakra does not add any markup  -  saving your clients 20–25% compared to some other solutions.

This split billing model keeps your subscription costs predictable while ensuring your clients pay Meta directly for message consumption  -  a transparent, trust-building setup for agency-client relationships.

A 7-day free trial with full feature and API access is available, with the option to extend if you need more evaluation time.

Why Choose Chakra Chat for Your WhatsApp Integration?

There are several WhatsApp Business Solution Providers (BSPs) in the market. Here's why Chakra Chat stands out for partners specifically:

  • Built for multi-number, multi-client use: Most solutions are designed for single-business use. Chakra's architecture is purpose-built for managing many numbers and clients under one roof.
  • Reliable, real-time APIs: Fast API responses and webhook reliability are critical for customer-facing integrations. Chakra's API layer is built for production-grade, real-time use.
  • Direct technical support: Partners get direct access to Chakra's technical team  -  not just a ticketing system. Advanced plans unlock priority ticket handling.
  • No hidden messaging markup: Your clients benefit from direct Meta billing  -  they pay exactly what Meta charges, with no middleman margin applied.
  • Affordable and scalable: Start with a subscription that fits your current client base and scale by adding numbers as you grow.

How to Get Started: Integration Steps

Chakra Chat provides a well-documented setup path for partners. Here's the high-level journey:

  • Step 1  -  Embed the WhatsApp Setup: Integrate Chakra's Embedded Signup into your application so your customers can connect their WhatsApp number and WABA directly from your UI.
  • Step 2  -  Connect the Channel: Your customers (or you, on their behalf) connect their WhatsApp channel, WABA, and phone number through the partner setup flow.
  • Step 3  -  Configure Automation: Set up chatbots, chat agent routing, automated messaging workflows, and start sending and receiving messages using the API.
  • Step 4  -  Listen and Track: Subscribe to incoming message webhooks and use API logs to monitor activity, debug, and build usage reports for your clients.

Full partner integration documentation is available in Chakra Help Guide and Chakra API Documentation.

Is This the Right Solution for You?

The Chakra Chat API Partner Solution is an excellent fit if:

  • You are a SaaS company that wants to offer WhatsApp automation natively inside your vertical product
  • You run an agency or marketing platform and manage WhatsApp messaging for multiple clients
  • You need programmatic control over WhatsApp channels, templates, and messaging flows
  • You want a cost-effective, no-markup messaging infrastructure for your clients

It may not be the best fit if:

  • Your clients want to use the Chakra Chat user interface directly (rather than your own product UI)  -  in that case, a standard Chakra Chat subscription may be more appropriate
  • You require fully unified billing where Meta's messaging charges are bundled into a single invoice from one vendor  -  the split billing model (Chakra subscription + direct Meta billing) may not suit that requirement

Ready to Add WhatsApp to Your Platform?

Chakra Chat's API Integration Partner Solution gives you everything you need to embed WhatsApp Business API into your product quickly, reliably, and affordably  -  without building from scratch.

Start with the 7-day free trial to explore the full API and features. If you need more time to evaluate, the trial can be extended.

FAQs

  1. Can Template Message be cloned? Yes, Chakra provides  a native template management module to create and manage WhatsApp Message templates. Clone Template feature is supported to clone an existing template in a different WABA (WhatsApp Business Account)
  2. Does Chakra provide programmatic addition of WhatsApp Connector /Plugin? Yes, we provide programmatic creation of new WhatApp Connector (Plugin) using APIs
